app.title: Climate Survival
app.subtitle: Climate-adaptive growing & prepping for what's coming

hero.title: Survive & Thrive Through Climate Change
hero.description: See what to buy and stock before prices rise, plus which crops to plant that will survive the coming weather changes — with harvest dates starting from this week.

location.title: Select Your Location
location.description: Choose your country or use browser geolocation for precise results.

loading: Analyzing climate data for your location...

forecast.horizonDesc: {{period}} — storage and growing recommendations are sized based on this forecast for your area.

stockUp.title: Stock Up — What to Buy Now
stockUp.description: These items are likely to increase in price or become scarce based on the climate signals detected. Pre-purchase now.

grow.title: Grow Your Own — Crops for the Coming Conditions
grow.description: These crops are matched to survive the forecast weather changes in your area. Plant now for harvest in the coming weeks and months.

noStorage.title: Storage: No Urgent Action Needed
noStorage.description: Climate conditions in your area are normal. No urgent stockpiling needed, but the growing recommendations below can help build long-term food security.

risk.itemsAndCrops: {{items}} to stock up on · {{crops}} crops recommended to plant

footer.dataSources: Data sources: Open-Meteo (seasonal climate forecast, weather, flood API) & World Bank (commodity prices)

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question, suggestion, or bug report? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your question or feedback...
contact.successMessage: Your message has been received. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

prices.noData: No price data available for the selected filters.
prices.footer: Daily wholesale & retail prices from the Central Bank of Sri Lanka (CBSL). Updated on weekdays.
